[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010111010 5
1 001001000 2
2 101101010 5
3 110111000 5
4 001110111 6
5 011011111 7
6 110001100 4
7 101101101 6

01 10 101101101 6 match 7
12 21 001101111 6
23 32 001111111 7
34 43 111111011 8
45 54 111111010 7
56 65 111101110 7
67 76 111001111 7
70 07 101101111 7

02 20 101101111 7
13 31 001111111 7
24 42 111111111 a
35 53 101111011 7
46 64 111011110 7
57 75 101101111 7
60 06 111101101 7
71 17 101001111 6

03 30 101111111 8
14 41 111011110 7
25 52 101101111 7
36 63 111110111 8
47 74 111011111 8
50 05 101101111 7
61 16 111001100 5
72 27 101101111 7

04 40 111111111 a
15 51 101101110 6
26 62 111101111 8
37 73 101111111 8
[completion]
